resources.string: Keeps recording your path while you walk.
Walk around to clear the fog. Tap to open.
FogWalk needs location access to reveal the map where you walk. Grant background location to keep tracking with the screen off.
Location permission is required to clear the fog.
Keep tracking your path in the background and resume after reboot.
For always-on tracking, choose \"Allow all the time\" for location.
Background location denied. Tracking will only run while the app is open.
